query: UPDATE public.editai_pipelines SET tts_previews = jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb_set(tts_previews, '{0,audio_path}', to_jsonb('media/tts/a35ce8f1-e4ba-4bf5-b9a1-adca9016a3dc/6c5db2b5-a5df-4c3c-81bb-751dc9febe50.mp3'::text)), '{0,library_asset_id}', to_jsonb('6c5db2b5-a5df-4c3c-81bb-751dc9febe50'::text)), '{1,audio_path}', to_jsonb('media/tts/a35ce8f1-e4ba-4bf5-b9a1-adca9016a3dc/a7a319d7-36e4-4b50-8254-a7ce4ccd4ee1.mp3'::text)), '{1,library_asset_id}', to_jsonb('a7a319d7-36e4-4b50-8254-a7ce4ccd4ee1'::text)), '{2,audio_path}', to_jsonb('media/tts/a35ce8f1-e4ba-4bf5-b9a1-adca9016a3dc/ffa7086f-6ab9-4080-b8bd-936c1c8a8457.mp3'::text)), '{2,library_asset_id}', to_jsonb('ffa7086f-6ab9-4080-b8bd-936c1c8a8457'::text)) WHERE id = '466bc293-a7ed-40c6-a015-d59c6479c47f' AND profile_id = 'a35ce8f1-e4ba-4bf5-b9a1-adca9016a3dc' AND tts_previews->'0'->>'script_hash' = 'f1b53141ae2178b14c748f16146b610cd0a9eab66b97126e66aa7bfa8935c068' AND tts_previews->'1'->>'script_hash' = '85e427f5ce06018d2fa2fa1f92ee4b19ad8e3ba01a8bfba467622580e351fa78' AND tts_previews->'2'->>'script_hash' = '10fe80f826a3f26e8be1c9e67706876b4bb6c259f0f5813c92e91056d1da6f94' RETURNING id, tts_previews->'0'->>'audio_path' AS variant_0, tts_previews->'1'->>'audio_path' AS variant_1, tts_previews->'2'->>'audio_path' AS variant_2
